studies.title: Weight management with a digital lifestyle intervention in persons with obesity
studies.health_condition:
Free text:
Obesity
ICD-10-GM (translation):
E65-E68 - Obesity and other hyperalimentation
Healthy volunteers:
No Entry
studies.brief_summary: Overweight and obesity are a major health threat. More and more digital weight loss programs are offered on the market. However, the effectiveness of such programs is unclear. Therefore, the effect of an app-based lifestyle intervention program on weight loss will be investigated.
studies.intervention:
Arm 1:
ADHOC group: app-based lifestyle intervention for 12 weeks, followed by 12 weeks of follow-up
Arm 2:
EXPECT group: current lifestyle for 12 weeks, followed by 12 weeks of app-based lifestyle intervention
Endpoints

classification.reason: The study does not explicitly mention randomization, controlled comparison, or interventional design. While it investigates the effect of an intervention, the lack of clear details about randomization or control groups leans towards an observational or real-world study. Preliminary analysis suggesting RCT is not confirmed by the provided information.
